details


WHAT IT IS

a salon service in a jar. this ultra-luxe hair mask provides superior toning while strengthening, repairing, and hydrating for bright, healthy blonde.

WHO IT'S FOR

all blondes, silvers + grays are welcome!

WHY IT'S SPECIAL

bring blonde back to life. packed with bond cure technology, plant butters, vegan protein, and ultra-violet pigments-- for your strongest + brightest mane yet!

  • the proof is in our claims - this reparative mask is clinically proven to significantly brighten, intensely hydrate, strengthen + repair hair. it results in healthier hair that is 8x more conditioned, 2.2x stronger with 56% less breakage.*
    *clinically tested.
  • ultra-hydration - this luxurious mask is packed with 3 different types of plant butters and adds a healthy dose of moisture to those dry strands.
  • tones brassiness - counteract any yellow, unwanted brassy hues for an icy blonde, silver or gray. lookin' cool.
  • strengthens + reduces breakage - while also helping to prevent future damage.

ingredients

KEY INGREDIENTS
  • bond cure technology - an innovative complex targeting hydrogen bonds, which are the most prone to breakage.
  • plant butters – includes three plant butters: mango butter extract which is packed with omegas and vitamins a, c, and e, omega-6 fatty acid-rich borage oil, and shea butter that’s loaded with vitamins, minerals, and five principle fatty acids
  • vegan proteins- derived from quinoa, vegan proteins are made up of essential amino acids which can provide keratin-like benefits from a plant source.
  • ultra-violet pigments – counteract yellow and brassy tones to bring out the best shades of blonde, silver, and gray.

how to


HOW-TO GET YOUR STRONGEST + ICIEST MANE:

please note: we suggest applying the bust your brass products on a test strip of hair at the nape of the neck before settling on a routine.

CUSTOMIZE YOUR BUST YOUR BRASS ROUTINE!

if you are a natural (non-color treated) blonde:

  • in the summer months (when hair is more likely to become brassy), use the bust your brass shampoo + conditioner every other wash.
  • use the bust your brass repair mask 1x per week in place of conditioner.

if you are a platinum blonde:

  • to maintain tone, use bust your brass shampoo + conditioner every other wash.
  • we suggest alternating bust your brass shampoo + conditioner with the kure shampoo + conditioner and multi-task repair treatment.
  • use bust your brass repair mask 1x per week in place of conditioner.
  • if you notice pesky brassiness pop up, use the bust your brass system every wash until desired tone is reached.
  • keep track of your tone: if you're loving your tone, keep up your routine as is. if you notice brassiness peeking in, increase use the bust your brass mask an additional time per week. if you are a little too cool-toned and nearing a violet tone, cut back on the bust your brass routine for a week or two.

if you have highlights, a balayage, or natural-looking (color-treated) blonde hair:

  • use bust your brass shampoo + conditioner every other wash.
  • assess hair's tone and pivot (increase or decrease usage) as needed.
  • those with naturally dark hair should use the bust your brass intense repair mask 1x per week in place of conditioner.
  • please note: naturally darker or brunette hair will fight to return to natural hair color; in this case, increase the usage of system.

if you have gray hair:

  • use bust your brass shampoo + mask every wash or alternate every other wash with the kure collection.

if you are a textured blonde:

  • follow the regimen suggested above based on type of blonde, but use the bust your brass repair mask in place of conditioner for an extra dose of moisture. the bust your brass repair mask is the perfect mix of toning, moisture, and repair which is just what a textured blonde needs.

anteage-home-microneedling-intro-kit:
The AnteAGE® Home Microneedling System is a safe and natural rejuvenation treatment that you can do at home to reveal healthy, more youthful looking skin.

Commonly known as Collagen Induction Therapy (CIT), microneedling is an advanced skin technique that uses shallow needles to stimulate the top layers of the skin. The treatment creates a release of natural growth factors (your skin’s native regenerative proteins), naturally encouraging rebuilding your own collagen and elastin.

The system contains two products: AnteAGE® Microneedling Solution and a Microchannel Roller (.25mm). These products work together to reactivate the skin’s natural regenerative properties.

AnteAGE® Home Microneedling Solution maximizes the regenerative power of microneedling. Stem cell growth factors and hyaluronic acid in the solution enhance your skin’s healing response, restoring a natural, youthful glow.

For optimal results and radiant looking skin, combine AnteAGE MD® Professional Microneedling treatments administered by your skin professional with the Home Microneedling System.

Benefits

  • Reduces the appearance of fine lines & wrinkles
  • Decreases the appearance of sagging skin
  • Visibly improves skin texture & tone
  • Makes pores appear smaller
  • Addresses discoloration

How To Use

  • Soak roller in rubbing alcohol to clean and sanitize the needles
  • Run hot water over the roller after soaking in alcohol to ensure the removal of any residual chemicals
  • Using the provided roller vial, apply Home Microneedling Solution to the treatment area.
  • Take the roller and roll in an X shape over the treatment area
  • Apply Home Microneedling Solution to treatment area after rolling has been completed.
  • Clean and sanitize your roller before putting it back in the protective travel case

What's Included

  • (2) 2ml vial of AnteAGE® Home Microneedling Solution
  • (1) 0.25mm depth Microchannel Roller
  • (1) Protective roller case

Ingredients

Water (Aqua), Human Bone Marrow Stem Cell Conditioned Media, Benzyl Alcohol, Dehydroacetic Acid, Hyaluronic Acid
anteage-vrs-box-6-pack:
The AnteAGE® Vaginal Rejuvenation Solution is a regenerative vaginal moisturizer. Harnessing the natural power of bone marrow stem cells, AnteAGE® VRS delivers lost bio-signals to restore a youthful micro- environment. Our at home VRS safely restores the vaginal wall using growth factors and cytokines without any added hormones. Physiologically balanced bio-signals from the stem cell cytokines reduce inflammation while the hyaluronic acid increases moisture that is native to the body. Clinical studies show tremendous improvements in dryness, pain and vaginal epithelium thickness within 1-3 months of use.

Purpose:

A thinning vaginal wall can cause a host of challenges for women, many of which go unaddressed and assumed to be normal effects of aging. Vaginal atrophy, stress incontinence, vaginal dryness, irritation, itching and pain associated with urination and intercourse become common symptoms with the onset of menopause or other hormonal shifts. Clinically tested by gynecologists, VRS provides excellent patient satisfaction as a homecare solution or when administered post-procedure.

Benefits

  • Addresses vaginal atrophy
  • Helps incontinence
  • Reduces vaginal dryness, irritation, itching and pain associated with urination or intercourse
  • Hormone-free

How To Use

  • Hold applicator tube at wide end and insert narrow end of applicator into the vagina. Squeeze product at wide end of tube. Use fingertip to target desired area. Discard tube and tip after use
  • For convenience, apply VRS before bed to allow it to absorb into your body while you sleep. For simple application, insert the solution while laying down and wear a thin panty liner to absorb any excess liquid
  • For homecare: Start by using one application of VRS every 2-3 days until the first box is complete. Follow up with 1 box every month, using 1 application every 6 days until patients notice an improvement
  • For post-procedural care: VRS is an excellent burst of healing growth factors to accelerate healing following laser or other ablative treatments. Use one tube of VRS everyday until the box is finished. Follow with 1 box per month as needed

Ingredients

Water (Aqua), Hyaluronic Acid, Human Bone Marrow Stem Cell Conditioned Media, Bixa Orellana Leaf Extract, Jacaranda Mimosifolia Flower Extract, Kalanchoe Pinnata Leaf Extract, Deoxyribonuclease, Glucose Oxidase, KGF (sh-Polypeptide-3), KGF-2 (sh-Polypeptide-10), VEGF (sh-Polypeptide-9)

Description

Reduce the discoloration of tender and unsightly bruises while relieving related pain and swelling.* Arnicare Bruise is the #1 selling Arnica bruise reducing brand† powered by the Arnica plant to heal bruises from within. Easy to take, the oral meltaway tablets dissolve in the mouth, working best when used soon after bruising has occurred. There are no known interactions with other medications, herbs, or supplements. Pair with Arnicare Bruise Cream or Gel for added topical relief and bare your beautiful skin!

Arnicare Bruise is an HSA & FSA eligible over-the-counter medicine recommended for adults and children ages 2 and up. Each box contains 60 unflavored tablets formulated without artificial sweeteners, flavors, colors, or preservatives. Boiron’s line of bruise relief medicines also includes a cream, gel, and oral meltaway pellets.

Drug Facts

Uses*

Reduces symptoms of bruising such as:

  • discoloration
  • pain
  • swelling
Active Ingredient:**
  • Arnica montana 9C HPUS — Relieves discoloration, pain, and swelling associated with bruising

The letters HPUS indicate that this ingredient is officially included in the Homeopathic Pharmacopoeia of the United States.

Inactive Ingredients:
  • Croscarmellose sodium
  • Lactose
  • Magnesium stearate
Directions
  • Adults and children 6 years of age and older: As soon as bruising occurs, dissolve 2 tablets in the mouth and repeat every hour for 2 more hours. Then, dissolve 2 tablets in the mouth every 6 hours until bruising has faded.
  • Children 2 to 5 years of age: Dissolve 2 tablets in 1 tablespoon of water for easier intake. Follow directions above.
Warnings
  • Stop use and ask a doctor if symptoms persist for more than 7 days or worsen, new symptoms occur, or if redness or swelling is present. These could be signs of a serious condition.
  • If pregnant or breast-feeding, ask a health professional before use.
  • Keep out of reach of children. In case of overdose, get medical help or contact a Poison Control Center right away.

Description

Scientifically formulated with the plant-powered ingredient Arnica, Arnicare Gel by Boiron relieves everyday muscle aches and pains without a traditional strong medicine smell. Use it at the first sign of back, neck, knee, shoulder, and leg pain; swelling from injuries; and on bruises.* The gel cools and refreshes upon contact. Its non-greasy, water-based formula is absorbed quickly by the skin, leaving no sticky residue. A homeopathic medicine, Arnicare Gel does not contain menthol, camphor, methyl salicylate, capsaicin, fragrances, dyes, or parabens. It does not mask symptoms that may indicate a more serious condition. Arnicare Gel is available over the counter in 1.5 oz and 2.6 oz tubes and a 4.2 oz value-size tubes. Boiron’s pain relief line includes a cream, ointment, tablet, and arthritis pain formula.

Drug Facts

Uses*

Temporarily relieves muscle pain and stiffness due to:

  • minor injuries
  • overexertion
  • falls

Reduces symptoms of bruising such as:

  • pain
  • swelling
  • discoloration
Active Ingredient:**
  • Arnica montana 1X HPUS-7% —Relieves muscle pain & stiffness, swelling from injuries, discoloration from bruises

Inactive Ingredients:
  • Alcohol
  • Carbomer
  • Purified water
  • Sodium hydroxide
Directions
  • Apply a thin layer of Arnicare Gel to affected area as soon as possible after minor injury. Repeat 3 times a day or as needed. If heat or ice is applied, wait 5 minutes before applying Arnicare Gel.
Warnings
  • For external use only.
  • Do not use if you are allergic to Arnica montana or to any of this product’s inactive ingredients.
  • When using this product
    • Avoid contact with eyes, mucous membranes, wounds, damaged or irritated skin .
    • Use only as directed
    • Dryness or irritation may occur
    • Do not tightly wrap or bandage the treated area
    • Do not apply heat or ice to the treated area immediately before or after use
  • Stop use and ask a doctor if
    • Condition persists for more than 3 days or worsens.
    • Symptoms clear up and occur again within a few days
  • Keep out of reach of children.
  • If swallowed, get medical help or contact a Poison Control Center right away.

Notes From The Color Wow Lab

It’s a completely different texture than any other masque: It isn’t a cream, it isn’t a liquid. It isn’t a paste. So …unlike most masks… it doesn’t just plop on top, coating your hair with thick, heavy moisturizers that make your hair smoother, but weigh it down and leave it flat.

Money Masque is an inside job: it instantly penetrates hair’s cuticle, and goes deep into the cortex to deliver massive hydration and rich, powerful Mediterranean-derived ingredients:

Notes From The Color Lab 

Breakthroughs that make it possible for Money Mist to work on every hair type

  1. “Adaptive technology” 

Money Mist can adjust to an individual hair fiber’s needs due to the diversity of the size of molecules, the molecular weight and type of ingredients found in the formula. Each fiber is nourished with the precise level of peptides, hydration and conditioning it requires to strengthen, moisturize and smooth texture.

2. Proprietary Baolyzed Amino Complex 

One of the keys to great hair is a strong cortex. When the cortex's crystalline interior becomes damaged – by chemical processing and heat tools – the hair loses strength and elasticity. Our Baolized Amino Complex easily penetrates the hair shaft to encourage crystal formation, and therefore helps to increase the strength, elasticity, and bounce of damaged fibers.

How To Use

  1. Can be used on damp or dry hair
    2. Divide hair into sections applying 2-3 pumps worth of product to each section and smooth through from top to ends.

Best For Hair Types

Fine, thin, limp hair. Ideal for color-treated, dry, dehydrated, damaged or fragile hair.

Notes From The Color Wow Lab

Typical volumizing products use hair-dehydrating ingredients (alcohol, salt and drying resins) to dry out and force open hair’s protective, outer cuticle layer. When the cuticles are roughed up and raised, hair strands can’t lay flat, creating the effect of fluffed-up, full-volume hair. However! opening the cuticle is very damaging, and leads to dehydration, frizz, brittleness. Xtra Large uses totally new volumizing technology: a weightless yet bulky polymer blend (fortified with strand-strengthening BAMBOO) that mimics a raised outer cuticle layer but leaves hair’s essential cuticle layer smooth, intact, and hydrated. The result? Instant voluptuous, sexy “naked” volume, body, guts and grip without compromising hair health.

1. OPEN: Remove brush cap, pull back the sleeve, and remove and discard the rubber band. Put cap back on.

2. ACTIVATE: With the cap still on, hold the brush with cap facing down and tap 3-5 times on a hard surface. Put some power behind those taps! Then remove the cap and run your finger through the bristles to ensure powder is flowing. Repeat tapping if needed, until you see a small puff of powder in the air when running your finger through the bristles.  

3. APPLY: Using small circular motions, sweep directly onto dry bare skin, moisturized skin, or over makeup. Apply generously across your face for at least 60 seconds while making multiple passes. Don't forget about your ears, neck and other areas! Reload more powder into bristles by giving the brush a good shake with bristles facing downwards, or recap, tap, and flick as necessary during application. If applying directly over a moisturizer, primer or liquid foundation, ensure products have fully set before applying Sunforgettable®. Reapply at least every two hours for continued protection.

Apply generously and evenly in circular motions prior to sun and environmental exposure. Wear alone all over for a subtle to buildable glow and full protection. 

Or use as a highlighter by applying to high points of the face. In this case, ensure full SPF protection by using another Total Protection™ product applied all over first. 

1. OPEN: Remove brush cap, pull back the sleeve, and remove and discard the rubber band. Put cap back on.

2. ACTIVATE: With the cap still on, hold the brush with cap facing down and tap 3-5 times on a hard surface. Put some power behind those taps! Then remove the cap and run your finger through the bristles to ensure powder is flowing. Repeat tapping if needed, until you see a small puff of powder in the air when running your finger through the bristles.  

3. APPLY: Using small circular motions, sweep directly onto dry bare skin, moisturized skin, or over makeup. Apply generously across your face for at least 60 seconds while making multiple passes. Don't forget about your ears, neck and other areas! Reload more powder into bristles by giving the brush a good shake with bristles facing downwards, or recap, tap, and flick as necessary during application. If applying directly over a moisturizer, primer or liquid foundation, ensure products have fully set before applying Sunforgettable®. Reapply at least every two hours for continued protection.

promoting skin brightness, moisturizing and barrier health.

health to improve the appearance of skin texture.

the appearance of fine lines & wrinkles. Helps to tighten and brighten the appearance of skin.

cyspera-ageless:
CYSPERA AGELESS helps repair skin affected by photodamage and inflammaging. Powered by Isobionic-Amide, it supports a more resilient, luminous and healthy-looking complexion.

HOW TO USE

Apply a thin, even layer once daily to clean, dry skin.
Use alone, or after CYSPERA INTENSIVE or CYSPERA SENSITIVE to enhance pigment correction results.

KEY INGREDIENT

Isobionic-amide is a molecule used in African traditional medicine for anti inflammatory purposes.

Isobionic-amide supports skin repair, resilience and visible skin quality by reducing underlying signs of photoaging and pigmentation.
cyspera-intesive-pigment-corrector:
CYSPERA INTENSIVE is a rinse-off cream designed for fast, visible improvement of uneven skin tone.
It helps to reduce the appearance of dark spots in as little as 4 weeks and enhance skin clarity, radiance, and texture.

It reveals a brighter, more even and radiant complexion while supporting overall skin quality.

KEY INGREDIENT

Cysteamine is a naturally occurring molecule that acts on multiple steps of the pigmentation process. It helps visibly reduce dark spots and improve skin tone evenness while supporting antioxidant protection and skin quality.

Isobionic-amide is a molecule contained in Garcinia kola, a plant used in African traditional medicine for anti inflammatory purposes. It has been clinically shown to boost cellular energy.

Concentration: Cysteamine 7%

HOW TO USE

Apply once daily as a short-contact treatment, start 5 min and gradually increase to 15 min.

Follow with CYSPERA AGELESS for enhanced comfort and improved results.

Apply daily for 16 weeks, then twice weekly for maintenance.
cyspera-sensitive:
CYSPERA SENSITIVE is designed to visibly reduce pigmentation while preserving the comfort and balance of sensitive and fragile skin. Powered by cysteamine, it helps improve skin tone evenness, reduce the appearance of dark spots and restore a naturally radiant complexion.

Its formula is adapted for sensitive, reactive skin, offering effective correction without aggressive action.

Key Ingredient

CYSPERA SENSITIVE is powered by cysteamine, a molecule naturally present in the human body that helps visibly reduce pigmentatin by supporting the skin’s natural antioxidant and pigment regulating pathways.

Cysteamine is backed by numerous clinical studies on its efficacy and adequacy to the skin biology.

How To Use

Apply a thin layer of CYSPERA SENSITIVE once daily to unwashed skin for 5–15 minutes (5 minutes for intimate skin).

eltamd-barrier-renewal-complex:
SKIN TYPES DRY
EltaMD Barrier Renewal Complex is clinically proven to moisturize the stratum corneum and improve dry, compromised skin after a single application within 24 hours. This advanced formula works to visibly minimize the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles while significantly improving skin texture, tone and pore size.

A selected blend of ceramides and other essential lipids helps strengthen the barrier and restore its natural hydration system. Enzymes and vitamins minimize the appearance of redness and promote skin cell turnover. Within 21 days, skin appears softer, smoother, healthier and more youthful. EltaMD Barrier Renewal Complex is fragrance-free, paraben-free, sensitivity-free and noncomedogenic.

FEATURES AND BENEFITS

  • Visibly improves skin appearance
  • Promotes healthy skin barrier
  • Replenishes moisture

INGREDIENTS

Ingredient Insights: 

Squalane: Naturally-occurring lipid derived from olives protects against moisture loss, makes skin more elastic and pliant, thereby improving the barrier structure of the natural lipid film.

Biotin: Enhances the overall organizational structure of the skin, increases flexibility and smoothness of skin by promoting the synthesis of lipids.

Ceramides – Ceramide NP, Ceramide NS, Ceramide EOS, Ceramide EOP, Ceramide AP: Provides protection by correction and repair of membrane defects of the stratum corneum lipid barrier. Increases the water transport mechanism known as aquaporin-3, amplifying hydration.

Tocopherol: Natural form of vitamin E with excellent bioavailability to the skin. Lipid soluble, potent antioxidant reduces free radicals to help diminish visible signs of aging.

Caprooyl Phytosphingosine, Caprooyl Sphingosine: Unique short-chain ceramides that function as signaling sphingolipids for keratinocyte differentiation. This leads to strengthening, densifying and smoothing effects of the stratum corneum.

Enzymes – Ficin, Actinidin, Bromelain: Proteolytic enzyme blend minimizes inflammation and soothes dry, itchy and compromised skin.

HOW TO USE

Apply morning and night to face, neck, and décolletage. For day-time use, follow with EltaMD sunscreen as directed by a physician.

Keeping newly resurfaced skin clean and free of secretions is critical. Dead skin cells and secretions, if not removed, can lead to skin infection, scarring and other complications. Cleansing must be gentle to avoid removing new skin cells that are forming.

EltaMD Dermal Wound Cleanser was specifically developed to gently remove foreign material, such as debris and dirt, from sensitive post- procedure skin. It is a non-cytotoxic, paraben-free and no-rinse cleanser that does not stain the skin. The ready-to-use formula reduces hygiene and patient compliance issues that home-mixed solutions may present. Cleanser can be poured onto cosmetic pads or sprayed directly onto the treated area, avoiding the eyes.

  • Gently removes foreign material, such as debris and dirt, from sensitive post- procedure skin

epicutis-luxury-on-the-go-care-set:
A new set made for all your needs on-the-go, complete with our Oil Cleanser, Lipid Serum, Hyvia® Crème, Travel Lipid Body Treatment, and Lipid Recovery Mask for Face and Eyes. It also makes the perfect travel companion.

How To Us

Oil Cleanser:

Dispense 2-3 pumps of Oil Cleanser onto clean, dry hands, and apply to a dry face. Use your fingertips to gently massage the cleanser into your skin in circular motions. Add a small amount of water to finger tips to emulsify the product, then rinse it thoroughly with water. For optimal results, use morning and night.

Lipid Serum:

Apply a pea-sized amount of serum to clean fingertips. Gently spread it evenly over your face until it is fully absorbed. For your neck and décolleté, use an additional drop. For optimal results, use morning and night.

Hyvia® Crème:

Apply a pea-sized amount to generously cover the face, neck, décolleté, and eye area. Gently spread and press until absorbed into the skin. For optimal results, use morning and night.

Apply to cleansed skin after any serums or fluids.
Gently massage 2–4 to drops into face, neck, and
décolleté. Use both morning and night.

hydrinity-eye-renewal-complex:
Provides intense hydration and helps to improve the appearance of fine lines, wrinkles, puffiness, and under-eye darkness

Description

Designed with accelerated precision, this serum addresses the multiple signs of aging, restoring a youthful vitality to your eyes.

Packed with our patented hyaluronic acid and PPM6 Technology, this powerful yet gentle formula effectively helps to reduce the appearance of crow's feet and fine lines, tackles puffiness and dark circles, and creates a well-rested and more energized look. With continued use, you'll notice your eyes appearing brighter, firmer, more hydrated, and beautifully revitalized.

Key Ingredients

Patented Injectable-Grade Hyaluronic Acid (Both LMW and HMW HA)

Cranberry Biopeptide:
Powerful collagen boosting with strong anti-inflammatory properties that reduce the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles.

Chrysin:
A botanical compound that occurs naturally in honey and passion fruit and has shown to be valuable in improving the look of dark circles by reducing excess melanin accumulation around the eyes.

Super Microalgae:
Known for being adaptable and able to survive in extreme environments, this combination of amino acids, minerals, and vitamin B12 helps to energize the skin and visibly improve overall luminosity and brightness.

Acetyl Tetrapeptide-5:
An eye-specific peptide that helps improve the appearance of eye contour by reducing under-eye puffiness and dark circles. It helps target tissue deterioration, excess fluid, and fat buildup under the eyes, which are known to be the main triggering factors for under-eye puffiness and darkness.

Palmitoyl Tetrapeptide 7:
Inhibits inflammatory responses and helps eliminate blood originated pigments responsible for dark circles.

Palmitoyl Tripeptide 1 and 5:
Slows skin aging by boosting collagen production while protecting against degradation - smoothing wrinkles and tightening skin

Application

Apply a small amount to the area around the eye, morning and evening. Avoid inner corners of eye.

Retinal

hydrinity-vivid-brightening-serum:
Formulated with our proprietary RPH TECHNOLOGYTM, this serum helps to visibly fade existing pigmentation, restore skin radiance, hydrate, and helps protect against future discoloration and damage.

Description

Experience the power of a more luminous, hydrated, and youthful complexion with our Vivid Brightening Serum. This accelerated hydroquinone-free formula introduces our proprietary RPH TECHNOLOGY™ that repairs, prevents, and hydrates to reveal a brighter, more luminous and even complexion.

Through a potent blend of safe brightening actives, plant-based antioxidants, botanical acids, targeted peptides, and our patented hyaluronic acid, this accelerated formula quickly diminishes the appearance of hyperpigmentation, age spots, uneven tone, and sun damage.

Key Ingredients

Patented Injectable-Grade Hyaluronic Acid (Both LMW and HMW HA)

Hexylresorcinol:
Proven to fade hyperpigmentation from sun exposure and plays a role in interrupting specific pathways in skin that lead to hyperpigmentation and uneven skin tone, thus improving the uniformity of skin’s surface color.

Botanical AHAs:
Helps to improve texture, uneven skin tone, and pigmentation by exfoliating the outermost layer of skin to reveal a smoother and more radiant complexion. 

Maqui Fruit Extract:
A dark purple edible berry from Patagonia, the Maqui Fruit provides powerful antioxidant properties that helps prevent and reduce hyperpigmentation, increases natural luminosity, and helps provide a more uniform skin tone. It also helps to reduce irritation and redness in the skin.

Oligopeptide-68:
A skin-brightening peptide that helps reduce new pigmentation formation by inhibiting the MITF gene that plays an important role in controlling melanin producing skin cells called melanocytes.

Acetyl Tetrapeptide-2:
Biomimetic peptide that shields skin from pollution while it protects skin proteins, lipids, and DNA to visibly improve dark spots and brighten skin overall. 

Agastache Mexicana:
Helps to reduce inflammation and redness, restores barrier function, and can even reduce skin temperature which helps to prevent new pigment formation.

Application

After cleansing, apply a small amount to face and neck morning and evening.

All products in the collection are formulated without parabens, phthalates, mineral oils, artificial fragrances, synthetic dyes or animal testing. 

IMAGE Skincare is committed to fostering a sustainable future. All materials used to create every product box is Forest Stewardship Council® certified and sourced from responsibly managed forests.

Why It Works

• Transformational gel breaks into water droplets upon application for rapid skin refreshment and hydration
• Delivers antioxidants, peptides and brightening nutrients
• Hyaluronic acid helps to replenish the skin
• Boosts the appearance of skin smoothness and bounce

How To Use

Apply to skin and vigorously massage to activate. Use in the morning and throughout the day for a burst of hydration.

THE IMAGE WAY
Use alongside your recommended IMAGE clinical grade skincare regimen. After cleansing, apply before facial serum or whenever your skin needs an extra boost throughout the day. Follow with DAILY PREVENTION SPF if used in the morning. Apply a repair crème at night.

Apply chilled after a hot shower to give skin an instant burst of refreshment.

What It Is

The reinvention of dry shampoo. The future of clean, powered by biotech. A non-aerosol dry shampoo powered by smart-release odorBIND™ bio-technology that delivers a high-performance clean, clinically eliminating odor and reducing oil without starchy buildup or white cast.

What It Does

Biotech-powered, non-aerosol dry shampoo. Revolutionary odorBIND™ smart-release technology doesn’t mask odors; it’s scientifically proven to recognize, suspend, and eliminate them. Translucent microbeads absorb oil without a white cast or starchy buildup.

What Else You Need to Know

Pros: After completing a salon service, stylists want their client’s style to last as long as possible. This product prevents excess oil production + prevents malodor; allowing style to last longer. It does this without conflicting styling benefits (grit, texture, buildup.)

Also fits:

• Stylists who dry cut and want to cleanse the hair without washing

• Stylists to recommend to clients for a hair-health-forward dry shampoo. To extend their in-salon blowout/style.

SHAKE WELL.

1. Hold the bottle 4-6 inches away from scalp for even distribution.

Non-aerosol format may feel slightly damp but will not disturb your style.

k18-damage-shield-ph-protective-shampoo:
What It Is

This color-safe, pH-optimized shampoo with the patented K18Peptide™ helps reduce excess hair cuticle swelling during washing to help prevent frizz, preserve color + enhance shine. Scalp microbiome-friendly and gentle enough to use every time you cleanse. Engineered for frequent or daily washing.

What It Does

• Cleanses while smoothing the hair surface: Effective yet safe cleansers break down and remove dirt + oil for optimal nourishment and manageability.

• Designed for daily use: pH-balanced formula doesn’t disrupt the hair fiber or scalp environment and is safe to use daily if needed.

• Creates the ideal foundation for healthy hair: This formula was engineered to create an optimal clean canvas without any fillers to coat or disrupt the hair and scalp equilibrium.

• Fortifies, softens and detangles hair while helping to protect against damage from daily mechanical styling, UV-rays, and environmental stressors, while the K18Peptide™ helps to replenish hair from damage that occurs during washing.

• Defends against damage: Shields against UV rays, environmental aggressors, and daily styling damage until your next wash (studied up to 3 days.)

• Strengthens + reduces breakage: Fortifies hair’s exterior lipid barriers to make hair more resilient and resistant to damage.

• Prevents color-fade while enhancing shine: pH-optimized formula minimizes excess cuticle swelling during washing and protects against oxidative damage, which can accelerate color loss and dull hair.

• Replenishes protein lost while cleansing: to maintain hair health and strength.

• Softens, smooths, and detangles: without film-forming silicones or waxes that can build up over time, weighing hair down.

What Else You Need to Know

• Less is more formulation delivers a superior clean without compromise.

• Optimized pH keeps the cuticle closed during washing and protects hair’s natural moisture levels for a smoothing hair result.

• Plant-derived surfactants create high foaming + cleansing power without being harsh or leaving buildup behind on hair or scalp.

• K18Peptide™ works as a protective shield to reduce protein loss that can occur during washing to keep hair feeling soft, strong, healthy and clean.

How to:

For Stylist Use

1. Use for higher frequency washing like multiple wash services or clients with less buildup.

2. Massage into hair, focusing on scalp.

3. Thoroughly rinse.

4. Repeat as needed.

For Client Use

1. Safe to use every time you wash.

2. Massage into hair, focusing on scalp.

3. Thoroughly rinse.

4. Repeat as needed.

Ingredients

Water (Aqua) (Eau), Sodium C14-16 Olefin Sulfonate, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Sodium Methyl 2-Sulfolaurate, Sodium Lauryl Sulfoacetate, sh-Oligopeptide-78, Panthenol, Glycerin, Sodium Phytate, Guar Hydroxypropyltrimonium Chloride, Disodium 2-Sulfolaurate, Caprylyl Glycol, Caprylhydroxamic Acid, Benzoic Acid, Citric Acid, Sodium Hydroxide, Sodium Chloride, Fragrance (Parfum), Limonene.

This leave-in conditioning heat protectant detangles, softens, and delivers deeper heat protection than ever before*—for 85% less breakage after blow drying⁷.

Apply throughout sectioned hair, brushing through to help with even distribution. Less is more. Start small and build as needed. Hair should feel soft and tangle-free, but not coated.

85% less breakage after blow drying⁷

With just one salon treatment using the K18 PRO Service (PRO mist + PRO mask), hair is restored up to:

• 91% original strength*

• 94% original elasticity*

*Results observed in a clinical study while using mist and mask as part of a bleaching treatment. Results may vary depending on hair type, quality, and history.

For at home use / or salon use without a chemical service:

1 - Shampoo, do not condition.

2 - Towel-dry thoroughly.

• 15ml size mask = Begin with 3 pumps of K18 leave-in molecular repair hair mask, only add more as needed depending on length, thickness, and condition. Apply all over, one pump at a time, maximum dosage is 9 pumps.

• 50 + 150ml size mask = Begin with 1 pump of K18 leave-in molecular repair hair mask, only add more as needed depending on length, thickness, and condition. Apply all over, one pump at a time, maximum dosage is 3 pumps.

3 - Let sit for 4 minutes. Do not rinse out.

4 - Then comb, add product + style as usual.

5 - Use for the first 4-6 washes, then as needed.

How to use with a chemical service:

1 - Prior to your service, mist hair with water (do not saturate).

2 - Section dry hair into 4 quadrants

3 - Apply K18 PRO mist per quadrant based on length and density

4 - Let sit for 4 minutes. Do not rinse out.

5 - Dry hair if needed, then perform desired chemical service.

6 - Shampoo, do not condition.

7 - Towel-dry thoroughly.

8 - Apply K18 PRO mask and add more as needed depending on length, thickness, and condition. Work evenly into hair from ends to roots, one pump at a time.

9 - Let sit for 4 minutes to activate. Do not rinse out.

10 - Then comb, add product + style as usual.

latisse-0-03-3-ml:
LATISSE®(bimatoprost ophthalmic solution) 0.03% - the first FDA-approved treatment for hypotrichosis of the eyelashes, increasing their growth, including length, thickness and darkness.

It’s important that your patients understand how to use LATISSE® correctly. Counsel them on the 5 application steps.

Application Instructions

5 steps • Once daily • 16 weeks


Step 1: Before applying
Before applying LATISSE® daily, ensure your face is clean and that makeup and contact lenses are removed.

Step 2: Prepare the applicator
Remove an applicator from its tray. Then, holding the sterile applicator horizontally, place one drop of LATISSE® solution on the area of the applicator closest to the tip, but not on the tip.

Step 3: Apply to skin using applicator
Immediately draw the applicator carefully along the skin at the base of the upper eyelashes (where the eyelashes meet the skin) going from the inner part of your lash line to the outer part.

Step 4: Blot excess
Blot any excess solution beyond the eyelid with a tissue.

Step 5: Dispose of applicator
Dispose of the applicator after one use. Repeat for the opposite eyelid, using a new, sterile applicator to help minimize any potential for contamination from one eyelid to another.
latisse®-5ml-10-week-supply:
LATISSE® (bimatoprost ophthalmic solution) 0.03% Important Information

After purchase, you will have to complete an online prescription form.

Approved Use

LATISSE® is an FDA-approved treatment to grow eyelashes for people with inadequate or not enough lashes.

Important Safety Information

Do not use LATISSE® if you are allergic to one of its ingredients. If you use/used prescription products for eye pressure problems, use LATISSE® under doctor care. May cause brown darkening of the colored part of the eye which is likely permanent. LATISSE® may cause eyelid skin darkening which may be reversible. Only apply at base of upper lashes. DO NOT APPLY to lower lid. Hair may grow outside the treatment area. If you have eye problems/surgery, consult your doctor. Common side effects include itchy and red eyes. If discontinued, lashes gradually return to previous appearance.

These are not all the possible side effects of LATISSE®. For more information, please talk to your doctor.

Please see LATISSE® full Product Information.

lumify-eye-drops:
LUMIFY redness reliever eye drops significantly reduce redness to help eyes look whiter and brighter, revealing your eyes’ natural beauty. Works in 1 minute.

-Unique, FDA-approved formulation uses low-dose brimonidine to selectively target redness
-Works in just 60 seconds and lasts up to 8 hours
-Lower risk of side effects like rebound redness when used as directed
-Absolutely no bleach or dyes
-#1 eye doctor recommended redness reliever eye drop

Directions

Adults and children 5 years of age and over:

-Instill 1 drop in the affected eye(s) every 6-8 hours
-Do not use more than 4 times daily
-Remove contact lenses before use
-Wait at least 10 minutes before re-inserting contact lenses after use
-If using other ophthalmic products while using this product wait at least 5 minutes between each product
-To avoid contamination, do not touch tip of container to any surface
-Replace cap after each use

-Children under 5 years of age: consult a doctor

Ingredients

Active ingredient: Brimonidine tartrate (0.025%) - redness reliever

Inactive ingredients: Benzalkonium chloride, boric acid, calcium chloride dihydrate, glycerin, potassium chloride, sodium borate decahydrate, sodium chloride, water for injection. Hydrochloric acid and/or sodium hydroxide may be used to adjust pH.

OVERVIEW

Experience the beginning of uneven skintone and elasticity care with the PDRN Pink Peptide Glow Serum. This advanced glow serum addresses uneven skin tone and enhances skin elasticity, helping to maintain a clear, radiant, and resilient complexion. With visible improvements in as little as two weeks*, it’s the ultimate solution for achieving healthy, glowing skin.   • Dermatologist-tested

EFFECTS OF PDRN & ROSE PDRN

PDRN (Polydeoxyribonucleotide) consists of DNA fragments that help restore the skin's natural barrier function. Mainly extracted from salmon, these DNA fragments are isolated through a process that ensures their high compatibility with human skin cells due to their structural similarity to human DNA. This compatibility enhances the skin’s natural barrier, making it stronger and more resilient.

Salmon PDRN is traditionally used for DNA and skin repair. Rose PDRN offers the same benefits as salmon PDRN, while also incorporating the advantages of rose extract and the safety of vegan ingredients. In addition, Rose PDRN is produced using sustainable methods, making it an eco-friendly choice. Both components are highly effective in boosting skin elasticity and reducing irritated skin.

  • Promotes a Radiant Glow: Rose PDRN stimulates skin renewal, giving your skin a brighter, more luminous complexion.
  • Boosts Collagen Production: Supports collagen production, maintaining skin firmness and elasticity while reducing fine lines.
  • Boosts Skin Elasticity: Enhances repair, making skin firmer and more resilient.
  • Reduces Irritated Skin: Helps calm and soothe the skin, which is beneficial for sensitive or irritated areas.
  • Brightens Skin Tone: Promotes a more even skin tone and natural glow by improving skin health and reducing irritated skin issues.
  • Aids in damage from environmental stressors: Helps damage such as UV exposure, and helps reduce the appearance of irritated skin.
  • Increases Skin Resilience: Strengthens the skin’s barrier function, enhancing its resistance to external aggressors and pollutants.
KEY INGREDIENTS
  • Rose PDRN (Rosa Damascena Extract + Sodium DNA)
    Boosts elasticity and helps restore the skin's natural barrier function, aiding the repair of damaged skin and promoting overall skin health.
  • 5 Types of Peptide Complex
    Boosts collagen production, firms the skin, and reduces the appearance of fine lines.
  • Niacinamide
    Brightens skin tone, reduces the look of irritated skin, and strengthens the skin barrier.
  • Adenosine
    Smooths fine lines and supports healthy skin structure.
  • Ocimum Sanctum (Holy Basil) Leaf Extract
    Provides protective benefits, soothes irritated skin, and reduces irritated skin.

1. Shake well before use for maximum ink flow.

Tip: Close cap tightly after use to preserve long time use.

moira-lavish-color-correcting:
MOIRA Lavish Color Correcting Concealer is a creamy lightweight formula that corrects unwanted flaws leaving your skin as the perfect canvas. Use white corrector to brighten the under-eye and highlight certain areas of the face. It can also be used as an eyeshadow base, to help customize foundation or concealer.

  • Cruelty-Free
  • Vegan
  • Paraben Free
  • Sulfates Free
  • Phthalate Free
  • Gluten-Free


HOW TO USE:


Conceal
1. Apply a small dot on the dark spot on your face or any other spot you want to conceal.
2. Blend out and repeat until desired coverage.

Highlight
With a shade of up to two times lighter than your skin tone, apply under eyes, bridge of nose, middle of forehead, and cheeks to even out and highlight your face.

Water(Aqua), Dimethicone, Cyclopentasiloxane , Butylene Glycol, Peg-10 Dimethicone, Propylene Glycol, Phenyl Trimethicone, Isododecane, Cetyl Peg/Ppg-10/1 Dimethicone, Caprylyl Methicone, Nylon-12, Dimethicone Crosspolymer, Sodium Chloride, Phenoxyethanol, Disteardimonium Hectorite, Triethoxycaprylylsilane, Sodium Dehydroacetate, Triethyl Citrate, Ethylhexylglycerin, Tocopherol, MAY CONTAIN/PEUT CONTENIR/PUEDE CONTENER (+/-): Titanium Dioxide (CI 77891).

PRODUCT DESCRIPTION

Live your lavish life with MOIRA's new Lavish Creamy Concealer. With a variety of 16 colors to choose from, Lavish Creamy Concealer works to conceal and highlight your face. This creamy, smooth, and lightweight concealer is perfect to even out your skin, cover dark circles, and any other imperfections you want to hideaway.

  • Cruelty-Free
  • Vegan
  • Paraben Free
  • Sulfates Free
  • Phthalate Free
  • Gluten-Free


HOW TO USE:

Conceal
1. Apply a small dot on the dark spot on your face or any other spot you want to conceal.
2. Blend out and repeat until desired coverage.

Highlight
With a shade of up to two times lighter than your skin tone, apply under eyes, bridge of nose, middle of forehead, and cheeks to even out and highlight your face.

Contour
With a shade of up to two times darker than your skin tone, apply underneath the cheekbone, sides of nose, hairline, and jawline to define and contour your face.

0.25 fl. oz / 7.5 ml

Achieve a radiant and natural glow with the MOIRA Sculpt & Glow Duo stick. This versatile 2-in-1 bronzer and highlighter enhance your features for a youthful and sun-kissed appearance. The matte bronzer and shimmer highlighter work together seamlessly to provide a water-resistant, non-sticky, and non-greasy cream-to-powder formula that lasts all day, even in humid conditions. Add luminosity to your complexion with this must-have beauty essential.

The matte bronzer and shimmer highlighter work together seamlessly to provide a water-resistant, non-sticky, and non-greasy cream-to-powder formula that lasts all day, even in humid conditions. Add luminosity to your complexion with this must-have beauty essential.

Benefits:

  • Water-Resistant
  • Long-Lasting
  • Retractable

Claims:

  • Cruelty-Free
  • Vegan
  • Paraben Free
  • Sulfate Free
  • Phthalate Free
  • Gluten-Free


HOW TO USE:

Bronze:

1. Apply stick bronzer directly onto the areas where the sun naturally kisses, like your temples and forehead.
2. Blend out to diffuse any harsh line for a seamless finish.

Highlight:

1. Apply stick highlighter directly onto the a high points of the face for a more glowing and radiant complexion.
2. Blend out to diffuse any harsh line for a seamless finish.
3. Use on shoulders & arms, legs, and collarbone for the perfect summer glow.


NET WEIGHT:
Matte 0.21 oz. / 6 g
Shimmer 0.18 oz. / 5.2 g

moira-set-correct-loose-setting-powder-0:
PRODUCT DESCRIPTION


Enhanced your best features with our MOIRA Set & Correct Loose Setting Powder. An ultrafine powder infused with Avocado Oil and Oryza Sativa that blurs and evens out skin texture with a soft matte finish and no flashback. Correct and achieve a radiant complexion with three different shades for every skin tone.

  • Cruelty-Free
  • Paraben Free
  • Sulfates Free
  • Phthalate Free
  • Gluten Free


HOW TO USE:

  1. Using a brush or makeup puff, pick up a small amount of all three powder shades. Blend together and tap off excess.
  2. Apply powder to skin to softly neutralize dullness, and even out skin tone while also setting makeup. 
  3. Reveal more even, naturally radiant skin.

0.16 oz. / 4.6 g

Serious staying power will have you worry-free about your makeup day or night.

  • Vegan

  • Sulfates Free

  • Gluten-Free

Shake well before each application, keep your eyes and mouth closed and spray 8-10 inches away from the face and spray evenly.

moira-signature-bronzer-003-golden-sunse:
PRODUCT DESCRIPTION

MOIRA Signature Bronzer is a gorgeous dual-color bronzer with a build-able lightweight powder formula that easily blends and glides on smoothly for an even, sunkissed look. A compact-sized tropical dream with a gold overspray to warm up your complexion. Swirl shades together for the best complimentary blend of color to sculpt your cheekbones!
  • Cruelty-Free
  • Vegan
  • Paraben-Free
  • Sulfates Free
  • Phthalate Free
  • Gluten-Free


HOW TO USE:

Tap a powder brush in bronzer and sweep it along the areas where the sun naturally kisses, like your temples and forehead. Blend out to diffuse any harsh line for a seamless finish.

Tip
Use the left-over product on your brush to add warmth to your nose, chin, and neck.

Transform your eye game with MOIRA Space Chameleon Multichrome Liquid Shadows! These magical shades glide effortlessly onto your lids, providing waterproof, high-impact colors that twinkle and shimmer like a dream. With its satin-smooth texture, this enchanting multichrome formula is perfect for a long-lasting, extra-sparkly gaze. Whether you use it on its own or as the ultimate eyeshadow topper, you'll be mesmerized by the whimsical kaleidoscope of sparkling hues that your eyes transform into.

  • Paraben Free
  • Sulfates Free
  • Phthalate Free
  • Gluten Free

moroccanoil-clarifying-shampoo:
A deep-cleansing shampoo that removes everyday buildup without stripping moisture, restoring hair and scalp to a healthy balance.

Massage through wet hair and scalp. Rinse well. Repeat if needed. Follow with your favorite Moroccanoil conditioner or mask. Use every two weeks, or up to once or twice weekly for those who use a lot of hair products, swim regularly, or have hard water.

Hair products, hard water and mineral deposits, chlorine and environmental impurities can all leave buildup over time—which can cause dull, greasy or limp hair. Moroccanoil® Clarifying Shampoo is a deep-cleansing formula that removes everyday buildup, restoring hair to a weightless, healthy balance. Rich in argan and avocado oils, keratin, lavender, chamomile and jojoba extracts, this clarifying shampoo nourishes your hair while gently cleansing impurities away. Color-safe. Sulfate-free, phosphate-free and paraben-free. 

• Removes 88% of oil*

• Removes 88% of copper pollutants*

• Removes 72% of aluminum pollutants*

• Removes 52% of metals such as calcium and hard water mineral deposits*

moroccanoil-color-continue-conditioner:
Lasting color starts with healthy hair. Moroccanoil Color Continue Conditioner helps improve haircolor retention by restoring hair’s integrity with each and every use. The key to this process is COLORLINK™, our groundbreaking technology that repairs each strand both physically and chemically in three ways:

1. Rebuilds the hair’s keratin structure, locking color within

2. Forms a protective shield to minimize color washout

3. Uses ArganID™ technology to infuse argan oil into the hair’s cortex, sealing and repairing the hair

To enhance the effects of the Color Complete Collection, start in the salon with the professional ChromaTech Service. After 10 washes, the collection is scientifically proven to extend color life and vibrancy by 100%.* 

Directions

After shampooing, apply COLOR CONTINUE CONDITIONER from mid-length to ends.
Leave on for 1-2 minutes.
Rinse well.
For best results, use with COLOR CONTINUE SHAMPOO and the rest of the COLOR COMPLETE regimen.

Ingredients

KEY INGREDIENTS:
COLORLINK™: uniquely creates cross-links throughout the keratin structure, helping to trap haircolor within while forming a protective shield that prevents haircolor washout.
ArganID™: positively charged micro-particles are attracted to the negatively charged hair fiber, infusing argan oil into the cortex while simultaneously helping to repair and seal moisture in the hair.
Ceramide 3; Ceramide 6 II; Ceramide 1; Phytosphingosine; Cholesterol: a blend of ceramides that have the ability to restore the skin, provide moisturizing benefits and enhance natural protection for a healthy scalp.
Quaternium-91: a blend of softening and conditioning agents.

Hair color is personal. Dry shampoo should be too. By popular demand, Moroccanoil® launches its first-ever dry shampoo in two formulas, for Light Hair Tones and for Dark Hair Tones.

Moroccanoil Dry Shampoo Light Tones contains ultra-fine rice starch that absorbs oil, buildup and odor, leaving hair instantly cleansed and refreshed. UV-protecting, argan oil-infused formula contains subtle violet undertones to balance brassiness in blonde hair and bring out the best in light tones.

AWARD Editor's Pick Award, TotalBeauty.com, Beauty Awards, 2016
HOW-TO
Shake well. Spray Moroccanoil® Dry Shampoo 6–8 inches (15–20 cm) away from dry roots. Let dry, then massage into scalp as you would with wet shampoo. Brush out.

moroccanoil-extra-volume-conditioner:
DETAILS

Gently detangle your hair while adding volume. Moroccanoil® Extra Volume Conditioner volumizes and gives fine hair body, shine and manageability without weighing it down. Infused with antioxidant-rich argan oil and fortifying nutrients, including linden bud extract, this volumizing conditioner transforms hair from lifeless to lively. Color-safe. Sulfate-free, phosphate-free and paraben-free.


HOW-TO
After shampooing, squeeze excess water and apply Moroccanoil® Extra Volume Conditioner from mid-length to ends. Leave on for 1–2 minutes and rinse well. Use regularly with Moroccanoil Extra Volume Shampoo for best results.

DETAILS

Transform and volumize fine hair from lifeless to lively! Moroccanoil® Extra Volume Shampoo works weightlessly to gently cleanse and add volume to fine, limp hair. moroccanoil-frizz-shield-spray:
A weightless styling mist that repels humidity to provide long-lasting frizz protection, leaving hair with glass-like shine and a silky, non-sticky finish.

This heat-activated spray eases the styling process while providing a defensive shield for long-lasting frizz, static, and flyaway control. The weightless formula helps protect against thermal damage and includes antioxidant-rich argan oil and other naturally derived and upcycled ingredients to care for hair from the inside out, leaving it silky, soft, smooth, and glass-like—without a sticky finish or film.

 Powered by HydroResist Technology, which wraps strands in a hydrophobic conditioning veil that repels humidity and other environmental elements for perfectly styled hair that lasts for days.

  • Protects against up to 90% humidity*
  • 94% said it’s the best anti-frizz product**
  • 98% said the hair is shiny and smooth**
  • 99% said the hair is soft**
  • 96% said product provides salon-worthy results**

Fragranced with the Moroccanoil signature scent, a Mediterranean-inspired blend of spicy amber and sweet floral notes.

*Results based on an independent lab study.

**Study of women ages 18-65.

Ingredients

AQUA/WATER/EAU, DIPROPYLENE GLYCOL, POLYSILICONE-29, SILICONE QUATERNIUM-18, ARGANIA SPINOSA (ARGAN) KERNEL OIL, ARTOCARPUS HETEROPHYLLUS (JACKFRUIT) FRUIT EXTRACT, AMARANTHUS CAUDATUS (AMARANTH) SEED EXTRACT, PARFUM/FRAGRANCE, POLYSORBATE 20, TRIDECETH-12, METHYLPROPANEDIOL, TRIDECETH-6, CAPRYLYL GLYCOL, GLYCOLIC ACID, POLYQUATERNIUM-80, CITRIC ACID, C12-13 PARETH-9, HYDROLYZED QUINOA, SODIUM PCA, SODIUM LACTATE, DIDECYLDIMONIUM CHLORIDE, ARGININE, ASPARTIC ACID, POTASSIUM HYDROXIDE, PCA, LACTOBACILLUS FERMENT, GLYCINE, ALANINE, ALGIN, CAPRYLIC/CAPRIC TRIGLYCERIDE, CHITOSAN, SERINE, VALINE, ISOLEUCINE, PROLINE, THREONINE, HISTIDINE, PHENYLALANINE, PHENOXYETHANOL, SODIUM BENZOATE, POTASSIUM SORBATE, BENZYL ALCOHOL, LINALOOL, ALPHA-ISOMETHYL IONONE. MOAHS02

How To Use

Spray throughout clean, damp hair. Comb to distribute evenly and blow-dry in sections to activate. Follow with a flat iron for enhanced anti-frizz benefits.

Frizz Shield Spray should be the last product applied before blow-drying for optimal heat activation.

nuda-bronzefoam-self-tanning-mousse-dark:
Achieve a flawless and even natural-looking complexion with our velvety and lightweight BRONZEFOAM tanning mousse. Easy to apply, fast drying and streak-free. Enriched with coconut oil, cucumber, mango, apricot and grapefruit extract, this mousse will leave your skin radiant and hydrated. This mousse will leave your skin radiant, smooth and hydrated. The Dark shade is perfect for those medium to dark skin tones who are looking for a dark golden glow. 

The Dark shade is perfect for those medium to dark skin tones who are looking for a dark golden glow.

Enriched with a bunch of skin-loving ingredients such as coconut oil, mango extract, chamomile extract and cucumber extract, this mousse will nourish your skin while offering you a gorgeous bronzed complexion. This product has been formulated with a stunning instant colour guide to ensure an easy and streak-free application.

  • Wash off colour guide.
  • Develops into 6 hours.
  • Tan that lasts up to 5–7 days.
  • Made from natural and naturally derived ingredients.
  • 100% vegan and 100% cruelty-free
  • Gluten-free, paraben-free and sulfate-free.
  • Without mineral oil.
  • Fresh mango scent.
  • Made in Canada.

How To Apply

Follow these steps to achieve a gorgeous natural-looking glow:

  • Exfoliate days prior to the application with the Body Exfoliant and Exfoliating Mitt.
  • Do not exfoliate, wash or shave the skin the day of application. 
  • Use on dry, clean and bare skin.
  • Moisturize dry areas including knees, ankles, feet, elbows and knuckles. 
  • Dispense 2-4 pumps of mousse onto the Tanning Mitt. 
  • Apply to skin one body part at a time in upward circular motions until evenly blended. 
  • Wait 5 minutes before getting dressed. 
  • Allow a minimum of 6 hours before showering to reveal the developed tan.
  • Shower in warm water to remove the colour guide.
  • Moisturize daily with the Body Cream to prolong and maintain the tan.

Ingredients

Aqua (Water), Dihydroxyacetone, Ethoxydiglycol, Glycerine (Plant derived), Decyl Glucoside, Erythrulose, Cocos Nucifera (Coconut) Oil, Mangifera Indica (Mango) Fruit Extract, Chamomilla Recutita (Matricaria) Flower Extract, Prunus Armeniaca (Apricot) Kernel Extract, Cucumis Sativus (Cucumber) Fruit Extract,  Citrus Grandis (Grapefruit) Seed Extract, Phenoxyethanol, Ethylhexylglycerin, Sodium Metabisulfite, Parfum (Fragrance), Red 40, Blue 1,  Yellow 5, Green 5, Citric Acid.

Experience complete customization of your tan with our express formula.  In just 2 hours, your tan will develop from a light luminous glow to a deeper and noticeable tan depending on wait times till rinsing.This allows you to adapt the result to your skin tone and achieve different shades of tan depending on when you rinse. The tan will continue to develop over the next 12 hours.

Note: The formula may change color over time due to the use of natural ingredients. This does not disrupt the effectiveness or development of the product.
Find Your Glow

The Medium to Dark shade is perfect for those with medium to dark skin tones who are looking to achieve a deep tan.

Discover your perfect match!

How To Use

Follow these steps to achieve a gorgeous natural-looking glow:

  • Exfoliate days prior to the application with the Body Exfoliant and Exfoliating Mitt.

  • Do not exfoliate, wash or shave the skin the day of application. 

  • Use on dry, clean and bare skin.

  • Moisturize dry areas including knees, ankles, feet, elbows and knuckles. 

  • Dispense 2-4 pumps of mousse onto the Tanning Mitt. 

  • Apply to skin one body part at a time in upward circular motions until evenly blended. 

  • Wait 5 minutes before getting dressed. 

  • Allow a minimum of 2 hours before showering to reveal the developed tan. The more you wait, the deeper the tan!

  • Moisturize daily with the Body Cream to prolong and maintain the tan.

Hairbiotic MD Helps Improve your Gut Health

Nutrafol Hairbiotic MD is a physician-dispensed supplement booster with probiotics to improve the gut microbiome health as it relates to hair health.

Hairbiotic MD is a natural product and was formulated with 10 clinically proven probiotic strains (25 billion CFU per capsule) to strengthen the gut-hair axis, support the gut lining and increase nutrition absorption.

Your Gut Health and Hair Loss Correlation

  • Poor gut health can compromise nutrient absorption, increase inflammation, disrupt the immune system, and aggravate stress, all of which have been shown to profoundly disrupt hair growth and quality. 
  • Poor nutrition assimilation due to a compromised microbiome detracts from metabolic processes involved in hair synthesis. As a result, ingredients in the hair supplements you take may not be completely absorbed. 

Gut health is one of the primary systems that relate to hair health. 

  • Gut health disruptors include stress, antibiotic usage, poor diet, aging, and lack of exercise. 
  • These stressors can result in (a) increased gut permeability leading to antigenic and immune damage, (b) system-wide rise in a low-grade inflammatory response, and (c) suppressed absorption of key nutrients needed to support hair production.9 
  • Pro-inflammatory cytokines such as TNF-a, IL-17, ROS, and harmful toxins are known hair health disruptors and travel through the body influencing the whole system, including the hair follicle.

Hairbiotic MD Features & Benefits:

  • Diversifies the Gut Microbiome — Probiotic strains included are known to reduce bad bacteria in the gut and promote growth of healthy bacteria.
  • Improves Nutrient Absorption — Probiotic strains included are known to increase absorption of key hair supporting nutrients. 
  • Supports the Immune System — Probiotic strains included modulate the gut-derived immune response known to impact the hair follicle.
  • Provides Effective Gut Support – Probiotics included strengthen the gut lining and defend against oxidative stress. 
  • Specific probiotic strains – 25 billion CFU in one capsule with 10 probiotic strains and innovative bacteriophage prebiotic.
  • Advanced probiotics – Support the gut-skin axis to promote better skin health. 
  • Effective and pure – Free of gluten, soy, preservatives, dairy, artificial additives.  
  • Acid-Resistant Capsule – Helps to ensure the probiotics survive stomach acidity and travel deep into the digestive tract. 
  • Insulated Bottle – Packaged in a double-chamber desiccant bottle to ensure viability of live probiotic strains without the need for refrigeration. 

Key Ingredients 

  • Contains 25 Billion CFU of 10 Probiotic Strains – Lactobacillus Reuteri – Supports the hair growth cycle and hair quality by shifting the cytokine profile of IL10 and IL-17 in animals.
  • Lactobacillus Helveticus – Shown to support the stress response in the gut and improve nutrient absorption.
  • Bifidobacterium Bifidum – Shown to improve nutrient bioavailability. 
  • Combination of Lactobacillus Strains – Known to increase healthy bacteria to promote skin health as it relates to hair through antioxidant activity and gene expression, including L. Acidophilus and L. Plantarum.
  • Additional Strains for Gut Health –  Includes Lactobacillus Rhamnosus, Lactobacillus Caseii, and Bifidobacterium Longum. 
  • Optimized Colonization and Delivery Two Bacillus Spore-Forming Strains – Includes spore forming bacteria strains Bacillus Subtilis and Bacillus Clausii which are known to stimulate colonization of “good bacteria” and improve gut health as it relates to hair.
  • Bacteriophage Prebiotic – A patented bacteriophage destroys pathogenic bacteria, releasing cellular contents for consumption by “good” bacteria.

Pair Hairbiotic MD with Nutrafol Hair Growth Supplements for an optimized, multi-targeted approach to hair thinning by improving the gut microbiome. Add Stress Adaptogen MD and Hair Growth Serum for a complete hair loss treatment.

Hairbiotic MD Frequently Asked Questions

Does this probiotic need to be refrigerated?
No. Hairbiotic MD is packaged in an insulated double-chamber desiccant bottle to ensure viability of live probiotic strains without the need for refrigeration. 

Is this a take-alone product?
No. Hairbiotic MD should be taken with your hair growth supplement. It has been specially formulated to improve gut health and allow better absorption of all ingredients in Nutrafol Hair Growth Supplements.

How many times a day should I take HairBiotic MD?
You should take it once a day, with or without food.

Neck Lifting Concentrate with Retinoid + Arbutin

A powerful triple-threat concentrate of patented Bi-Mineral Contour Complex™, retinoid, and arbutin formulated to target area-specific signs of skin aging on the delicate skin of the neck and upper chest. ELASTIderm Neck and Décolleté Concentrate supports skin elasticity and visibly improves horizontal neck lines, fine lines, skin sagging, crepiness, and with noticeable results in as little as 8 weeks*.   • Smooths: Decreases the look of fine lines & wrinkles and signs of skin aging
  • Brightens: Improves uneven skin tone for a more radiant appearance
  • The roller bar leverages mechanobiology – a principle that combines the soothing pressure of application with the concentrate formula to visibly improve skin elasticity and texture.

Skin Type: Combination Skin, Dry Skin, Normal Skin, Oily Skin

Skin Concerns:Skin Discoloration, Fine Lines and Wrinkles, Sagging Skin


The Details

Skin of the neck and décolleté experiences many of the same skin-damaging factors as facial skin, often without the same level of care and focus dedicated to it. Left unsupported, stressors like tech neck and sun exposure break down elastin, an important protein, and other skin properties, resulting in prominent signs of skin aging including horizontal lines, crepiness and submental sagging on the neck along with skin discoloration, uneven skin tone and wrinkles on the upper chest.

When addressed with proper care, skin can maintain its healthy state. ELASTIderm Neck and Décolleté Concentrate is a triple-action formula with patented Bi-Mineral Contour Complex, a retinoid and arbutin to help skin look younger and healthier.

See Results in as little as 8 weeks, 12 weeks for full results.

Neck Results
In 12 weeks, study participants showed*:

  • 22% improvement in horizontal neck lines
  • 27% improvement in fine lines
  • 14% improvement in skin sagging
  • 15% improvement in firmness
  • 19% improvement in even skin tone
  • 24% improvement in crepiness

Décolleté Results 
In 12 weeks, study participants showed*: 

  • 14% improvement in skin discoloration
  • 36% improvement in fine lines
  • 17% improvement in uneven skin tone
  • 22% improvement in skin smoothness
  • 23% improvement in crepiness

Science & Innovation

With a 30-year legacy of science and innovation, Obagi has led transformative research that has met the needs of every skin tone and type. We believe skin care is more than “correcting” or even “preventing,” it’s about unleashing your skin’s full potential. That’s why at Obagi we create inclusive products that support the diversity we all bring to the table. It’s about developing scientifically backed, clinical-quality formulations to promote healthy, future-facing skin.

*Results based on a 2021 12-week blinded study. Data on file at Obagi Cosmeceuticals LLC.

If after the purchase is made it is determined that you are not eligible for this product, we will cancel your order and issue a full refund.

Active Ingredient:

4% Hydroquinone

Instructions

  1. Cleanse and tone
  2. Apply to dry face and neck in the evening
  3. Follow with moisturizer

Warnings and Precautions

Avoid eye and mouth area when applying the product. Do not eat the product.

CONTRAINDICATIONS

People with prior history of sensitivity or allergic reaction to this product or any of its ingredients should not use it. The safety of topical hydroquinone use during pregnancy or in children (12 years and under) has not been established.

WARNINGS

Avoid contact with eyes, nose, mouth, or lips. In case of accidental contact, patient should rinse eyes, nose, mouth, or lips with water and contact physician.

Sunscreen use is an essential aspect of hydroquinone therapy because even minimal sunlight exposure sustains melanocytic activity.

Contains sodium metabisulfite, a sulfite that may cause allergic-type reactions including anaphylactic symptoms and life-threatening or less severe asthmatic episodes in certain susceptible people. The overall prevalence of sulfite sensitivity in the general population is unknown and probably low. Sulfite sensitivity is seen more frequently in asthmatic than in nonasthmatic people.

PRECAUTIONS

Treatment should be limited to relatively small areas of the body at one time since some patients experience a transient skin reddening and a mild burning sensation, which does not preclude treatment.

Pregnancy Category C: Animal reproduction studies have not been conducted with topical hydroquinone. It is also not known whether hydroquinone can cause fetal harm when used topically on a pregnant woman or affect reproductive capacity. It is not known to what degree, if any, topical hydroquinone is absorbed systemically. Topical hydroquinone should be used on pregnant women only when clearly indicated.

Nursing Mothers: It is not known whether topical hydroquinone is absorbed or excreted in human milk. Caution is advised when topical hydroquinone is used by a nursing mother.

Pediatric Usage: Safety and effectiveness in children below the age of 12 years have not been established.

Use of the product should be discontinued if hypersensitivity to any of the ingredients is noted.

*Contains sodium metabisulfite, a sulfite that may cause allergic-type reactions including anaphylactic symptoms and life-threatening or less severe asthmatic episodes in certain susceptible people. The overall prevalence of sulfite sensitivity in the general population is unknown and probably low. Sulfite sensitivity is seen more frequently in asthmatic than in nonasthmatic people.

Fade dark spots with Obagi Nu-Derm Fx System - Normal to Dry Skin.

You don’t need harsh ingredients to achieve a brighter, more radiant complexion. Obagi Nu-Derm Fx System for Normal to Dry Skin contains seven hydroquinone-free products to help improve the appearance of dark spots, discoloration, wrinkles, sun damage and other signs of aging. Each product included in this system helps enhance skin brightness and clarity, revealing a more youthful appearance. These formulas also hydrate and nourish dry skin for a softer, smoother texture. With continued use, this anti-aging system will help diminish discoloration, wrinkles, rough skin and more. 

  • Minimizes dark spots and discoloration with 7% arbutin
  • Hydroquinone-free formulas won’t causes irritation or sensitivity
  • Clinical studies show an improvement in discoloration and sun damage in 24 weeks

Reveal a more youthful appearance with Obagi Nu-Derm Fx System for Normal to Dry Skin.

Obagi Nu-Derm Fx System for Normal to Dry Skin contains Nu-Derm Gentle Cleanser (6.7 oz), Nu-Derm Toner (6.7 oz), Nu-Derm Clear Fx (2 oz), Nu-Derm Exfoderm (2 oz), Nu-Derm Blender Fx (2 oz), Hydrate Facial Moisturizer (1.7 oz) and Sun Shield Matte Broad Spectrum SPF 50 (3 oz).

*Contains sodium metabisulfite, a sulfite that may cause allergic-type reactions including anaphylactic symptoms and life-threatening or less severe asthmatic episodes in certain susceptible people. The overall prevalence of sulfite sensitivity in the general population is unknown and probably low. Sulfite sensitivity is seen more frequently in asthmatic than in nonasthmatic people.

Directions

Morning:

Step 1 - Obagi Nu-Derm Gentle Cleanser: Apply twice daily to damp face and neck with moistened fingertips. Rinse completely with warm water.

Step 2 - Obagi Nu-Derm Toner: Apply twice a day after cleansing. Saturate cotton pad and wipe gently over face and neck. Avoid the eyelid area. Do not rinse off.

Step 3 - Obagi Nu-Derm Clear Fx: Measure ½ to 1 gram (approximately 1 to 2 pea-size drops) and apply evenly to the entire face twice daily or as directed by your physician. Avoid contact with the eyes.

Step 4 - Obagi Nu-Derm Exfoderm: Apply to face in the morning following the application of Obagi Nu-Derm Clear or as directed by your physician.

Step 5 - Obagi Hydrate Facial Moisturizer: Apply a thin layer to the face twice daily or as directed by a physician.

Step 6 - Obagi Sun Shield SPF 50: Apply liberally 30 minutes before sun exposure and reapply as needed every two to three hours or after towel drying, swimming or perspiring. For use on children younger than six months, consult a physician.

Evening:

Step 1 - Obagi Nu-Derm Gentle Cleanser: Apply twice daily to damp face and neck with moistened fingertips. Rinse completely with warm water.

Step 2 - Obagi Nu-Derm Toner: Apply twice a day after cleansing. Saturate cotton pad and wipe gently over face and neck. Avoid the eyelid area. Do not rinse off.

Step 3 - Obagi Nu-Derm Clear Fx: Measure ½ to 1 gram (approximately 1 to 2 pea-size drops) and apply evenly to the entire face twice daily or as directed by your physician. Avoid contact with the eyes.

Step 4 - Obagi Nu-Derm Blend Fx: Use this product in the evening mixed with your tretinoin/Retin-A. Measure ½ to 1 gram (approximately 1 to 2 pea-size drops) and apply evenly to the entire face, avoiding the eyelid area. Massage until completely absorbed.

Step 5 - Obagi Hydrate Facial Moisturizer: Apply a thin layer to the face twice daily or as directed by a physician.

CONTRAINDICATIONS:
People with prior history of sensitivity or allergic reaction to this product or any of its ingredients should not use it. The safety of topical hydroquinone use during pregnancy or in children (12 years and under) has not been established.

WARNINGS:
Avoid contact with eyes, nose, mouth, or lips. In case of accidental contact, patient should rinse eyes, nose, mouth, or lips with water and contact physician.

Sunscreen use is an essential aspect of hydroquinone therapy because even minimal sunlight exposure sustains melanocytic activity.

Contains sodium metabisulfite, a sulfite that may cause allergic-type reactions including anaphylactic symptoms and life-threatening or less severe asthmatic episodes in certain susceptible people. The overall prevalence of sulfite sensitivity in the general population is unknown and probably low. Sulfite sensitivity is seen more frequently in asthmatic than in nonasthmatic people.

PRECAUTIONS (ALSO SEE WARNINGS):
Treatment should be limited to relatively small areas of the body at one time since some patients experience a transient skin reddening and a mild burning sensation, which does not preclude treatment.

Pregnancy Category C: Animal reproduction studies have not been conducted with topical hydroquinone. It is also not known whether hydroquinone can cause fetal harm when used topically on a pregnant woman or affect reproductive capacity. It is not known to what degree, if any, topical hydroquinone is absorbed systemically. Topical hydroquinone should be used on pregnant women only when clearly indicated.

Nursing Mothers: It is not known whether topical hydroquinone is absorbed or excreted in human milk. Caution is advised when topical hydroquinone is used by a nursing mother.

Pediatric Usage: Safety and effectiveness in children below the age of 12 years have not been established.

Use of the product should be discontinued if hypersensitivity to any of the ingredients is noted.

Please see Prescribing Information for Clear, Blender, and Sunfader.
